name: Sweet Home
description_short: This is not a financial services company. The website is an IMDb page for a Korean horror/drama TV series that aired 2020-2024.
description_long: Sweet Home is a Korean television drama series that premiered in 2020 and concluded in 2024, spanning 3 seasons with 26 total episodes. The show is a horror/survival drama centered on a teenage protagonist forced to confront monsters threatening humanity. The IMDb page lists cast members including Song Kang, Lee Jin-wook, and Lee Si-young, along with episode guides, user reviews, and streaming information. The series has a 7.2/10 IMDb rating based on 42,000 user reviews. The website content provided consists entirely of entertainment industry data: episode titles, cast lists, viewer ratings, production credits, and promotional material for Prime Video streaming access. There is no financial services content, no lending products, no credit tools, no loan offerings, and no consumer finance information of any kind present on this page. This appears to be a data entry error where an entertainment property was mistakenly assigned a financial services category.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)

diagnosis: This is not a consumer finance company. The URL and website content are for a Korean television drama series, not a financial services provider. This profile should be removed from the CreditDoc database and the data entry corrected or deleted.
